author: balibaloo
description: Prompts for values and templates to create notes.
name: Contextual note templating

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Big Update: [Update readme](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/a8abd5c630cab9c071c7dc068137cce385e6acfc) 

Updates:
- [Add note filter set dropdown](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/a82f01ba291966a233a19c6a91e715fe719c68ea)
- [Add filtered opener plugin missing notice](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/a20fac12a9a4b71f0818ded605fd395019d56f58)
- [Make prompt is_required default to true](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/820379bdbee190584c402b628cf290c8ee017c6b)
- [Add required property check using schema](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/b4a52c6f1084a8894f48d3b8ec0dd642bcd97218)
    - [Use required (!) instead of optional (?) character in schema](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/d6626f4abb9c16f953666c073c79ddd058ef7f12)
- [Split disabled and hidden](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/be7ebfb0d21ebebd674fe5aba8a922bbdabb511d)
- [Fix FilteredOpener API call by moving filter_set_name into param object](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/3c8a1d5e6f64e58969656f8fb73e74260e65d21e)


Various fixes:
- [Fix yaml schema replaces_selection_with default](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/bb5e2f35d3a721fd8d0ad0b23d61d59e93b15848), [Fix missing folder prompt properties from schema](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/de9108744f39a13d889ff2730043882162c0057a)
- [Fix logs rename variables to prompts](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/e809d1e089351892953e578fc3acec01524a31a1)
- [Fix unrecognized output_format warning](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/f0b2e0821ac90c35ff02b694e264c0085d06ea4a)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/compare/3.1.2...3.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: [Fix folder variable](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/69642e68176878f563470bd81825cfbf86e04a78) because of Filtered Opener API change in [1.3.0](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-filtered-opener/releases/tag/1.3.0)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Add:
- Using selection for note and folder prompts with relative paths c4d41ab368ddce7a4cf9012bccb5403e073623bb
- Output format for note and folder prompts. afc161b6e640b98eafb35f73fe7bed3ad98e110c
    - Note and Folder can be output as path or name.
- Invalid selection notice 4cc6d360305dd1bc5bb8b6417c156404b346dd19
    - you will be notified if your selection is invalid instead of just being shown the prompt.

Fix:
- Intent schema now shows the full list of values for properties that support this. 0e20f1078a31a13d935d3e1469d03b0005b43a5c



**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/compare/3.1.0...3.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Breaking:
- [Remove default new_note_name variable](https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/commit/c2d6bb83332237cab085a697bfdd018588cb0102)


Features:
- Allow configuring Note and Folder FilterSet properites in frontmatter
    - Can now configure properties like `include_path_name` in prompt frontmatter
    - Relative paths in these properties are resolved from the note that contains the intent


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/compare/3.0.4...3.1.0

- Add relative path inputs to folder and note variables

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**This version introduces breaking changes to the yaml schema**
**Please see changes made to intentsSchema.yaml in the full changelog**
This is not ready for public release as planned large user experience changes could change the yaml schema and require new documentation.

- Small features
    - reserved intent_name variable
- Big features
    - prompts can use variables
    - split pathname to with_name and in_folder
    - use new note properties in templating
- User experience changes
    - rename commands
    - yaml syntax changes
    - unknown yaml property warnings in console
    - legacy syntax notice

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/compare/2.2.1...3.0.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Schema 2.0
All property names are now self-descriptive which makes it easier to find the right section of a large intent.
- [New Schema](intentsSchema.yaml)

**The new configuration schema is not backwards comatible.**

It is being released now to preempt future non-breaking but high level conceptual changes to the way users interact with the plugin and the way the README introduces them to the plugin.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Balibaloo/obsidian-local-template-configuration/compare/1.2.0...2.0.0
